title: LGBTQ2+ SUPPORT GROUPS - 211info
text: PFLAG LGBTQ2+ SUPPORT GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about support groups and specialized information and referral through local chapters of the organization. 1625 K Street NW Suite 700 Washington, DC 200065112 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as LGBTQ2+ and their friends and families Hours: Not applicable Email (202) 467-8180 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (202) 467-8180 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: LGBTQ2+ Advocacy Groups LGBTQ2+ Support Groups Specialized Information and Referral * LGBTQ2+ Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PFLAG
